steps.t: There will be barrels of uneaten food at the goblin-camps of Weatherfoot, north-east of The Forsaken Inn and south-west of Weathertop. Lieva Dourlily …
Lieva Dourlily awaits your return at The Forsaken Inn, south-west of Weatherfoot. You added the contents of Lieva's draught to the food-barrels found …
